close_reason: All exit criteria met: go.mod parsing, BUCK generation, transitive deps, no import rewriting needed
description:
Exit criteria for Phase 3: Go Project Integration

Required for completion:
1. Parse go.mod to discover Go packages in project
2. Generate BUCK files with:
   - go_library targets for library packages
   - go_binary targets for main packages
   - go_test targets for test files
3. External dependencies from Nix-managed deps cell:
   - Simple deps (no transitive) working
   - Transitive dependency graphs resolved
   - Code builds with both `go build` AND `buck2 build`
4. No import path rewriting required

Test scenarios:
- `examples/hello/` builds (already done in Phase 1)
- `examples/hello-deps/` with external dep builds
- Real-world Go project (e.g., small CLI tool) builds with Buck2

Depends on: turnkey-538, turnkey-539, turnkey-540
title: Phase 3 Exit Criteria
